mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ai_provider_config ORDER BY priority ASC, id ASC
SELECT * FROM ai_provider_config WHERE provider_code = #{providerCode} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_provider_config SET last_test_success = #{success}, last_test_message = #{message}, last_test_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT ai_type AS provider, model, COUNT(*) AS requestCount, SUM(IFNULL(tokens_used, 0)) AS tokensUsed, SUM(IFNULL(cost, 0)) AS cost, SUM(CASE WHEN success = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS successCount FROM t_ai_usage_log WHERE create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY ai_type, model ORDER BY requestCount DESC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS day, COUNT(*) AS requestCount, SUM(IFNULL(tokens_used, 0)) AS tokensUsed, SUM(IFNULL(cost, 0)) AS cost, SUM(CASE WHEN success = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS successCount FROM t_ai_usage_log WHERE create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY day ASC

SELECT COUNT(*) AS requestCount, SUM(IFNULL(tokens_used, 0)) AS tokensUsed, SUM(IFNULL(cost, 0)) AS cost, SUM(CASE WHEN success = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS successCount, SUM(CASE WHEN success = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS failedCount, AVG(IFNULL(duration_ms, 0)) AS avgDurationMs FROM t_ai_usage_log WHERE create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY)
